'''ngadhasa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:chadur|chadur]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-dh-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chadur|chadur]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| ngadhasa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngædhæsæth|ngædhæsæth]] || [[word:ngædhæsæj|ngædhæsæj]] || [[word:ngædhæsæsh|ngædhæsæsh]] || [[word:ngædhæsæ|ngædhæsæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngadhadhasath|ngadhadhasath]] || [[word:ngadhadhasaj|ngadhadhasaj]] || [[word:ngadhadhasash|ngadhadhasash]] || [[word:ngadhadhasa|ngadhadhasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngadhasath|ngadhasath]] || [[word:ngadhasaj|ngadhasaj]] || [[word:ngadhasash|ngadhasash]] || [[word:ngadhasa|ngadhasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngadhafsath|ngadhafsath]] || [[word:ngadhafsaj|ngadhafsaj]] || [[word:ngadhafsash|ngadhafsash]] || [[word:ngadhafsaf|ngadhafsaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngadhasatha|ngadhasatha]] || [[word:ngadhasaja|ngadhasaja]] || [[word:ngadhasasha|ngadhasasha]] || [[word:ngadhasaka|ngadhasaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngadhasath|ngadhasath]] || [[word:ngadhasaj|ngadhasaj]] || [[word:ngadhasash|ngadhasash]] || [[word:ngadhasa|ngadhasa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngadhasathal|ngadhasathal]] || [[word:ngadhasajal|ngadhasajal]] || [[word:ngadhasashal|ngadhasashal]] || [[word:ngadhasakal|ngadhasakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngadhasathatha|ngadhasathatha]] || [[word:ngadhasajaja|ngadhasajaja]] || [[word:ngadhasashasha|ngadhasashasha]] || [[word:ngadhasaka|ngadhasaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngadhasathan|ngadhasathan]] || [[word:ngadhasajan|ngadhasajan]] || [[word:ngadhasashan|ngadhasashan]] || [[word:ngadhasakan|ngadhasakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngadhasathaoro|ngadhasathaoro]] || [[word:ngadhasajaoro|ngadhasajaoro]] || [[word:ngadhasashaoro|ngadhasashaoro]] || [[word:ngadhasakaoro|ngadhasakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
